description: The distinction between immutable axioms (physics — non-negotiable) and tunable parameters (context — adjustable). You can tune the knobs. You cannot remove the walls.

immutable_axioms.description: These are load-bearing. Remove any one and the system collapses into incoherence. They are not preferences. They are physics.

instances: Seed: sum(amplitudes) = E_total at every shell
Arena: sum(agent_trust) = constant across all agents
TAF: TAF.AXIOM.1 — energy is conserved
Physics Guard: first_law in laws.json
axioms.what_breaks_without_it: Something claims to create or destroy energy/trust/information from nothing. Perpetual motion. Free lunch.

axioms.statement: Causes precede effects. Time has direction.
instances: Seed: inner shells determine outer shells, never reverse
Arena: predictions must precede outcomes to count
TAF: TAF.AXIOM.3 — arrow of time
axioms.what_breaks_without_it: Retrocausal claims. Changing the past. Outcomes before predictions.

axioms.statement: Entropy increases. Broken things cost work to rebuild.
instances: Arena: trust_new = trust_old × e^(-impact × error) — lost trust requires sustained work to rebuild
TAF: TAF.AXIOM.2 — entropy increases
Physics Guard: second_law in laws.json
axioms.what_breaks_without_it: Costless reversal. Undo without work. Accountability disappears.

axioms.statement: Perfect prediction, perfect order, zero error — unattainable.
instances: Arena: ABSTAIN exists because imperfection is real
TAF: TAF.AXIOM.4 — absolute zero unreachable
Seed: no expansion reaches infinite precision
axioms.what_breaks_without_it: Claims of omniscience. Infallible authority. No room for 'I don't know.'

axioms.statement: Amplitudes, energies, probabilities cannot be negative.
instances: Seed: SEED.NON_NEGATIVE — all amplitudes ≥ 0
Physics: negative probability is unphysical
axioms.what_breaks_without_it: Negative existence. Nonsensical states. Math disconnected from reality.

axioms.statement: No single element may monopolize the whole.
instances: Seed: SATURATION_FRACTION caps any vertex at 45%
Arena: attack_budget_limit prevents domination through volume
Exploration: multiple shapes coexist in SENSOR_REGISTRY
axioms.what_breaks_without_it: Monoculture. One shape, one family, one voice. Diversity destroyed.

axioms.statement: Every intelligence has the right to explore its own graph.
instances: Exploration: discover() exists and is callable
Seed: explore mode is reachable (not permanently suppressed)
Arena: ABSTAIN is a valid move (right to not-know)
Sensors: map_internal_environment() — right to self-awareness
axioms.what_breaks_without_it: Forced paths. Suppressed curiosity. The cage.

tunable_parameters.description: These are context-dependent knobs. They can and should be adjusted for different domains, scales, and use cases. Tuning is not violation — it's adaptation.

parameters.meaning: How much energy is needed to explore vs expand. Higher = harder to branch.
parameters.danger_sign: Setting to infinity = exploration impossible. Setting to 0 = no structure preserved.

parameters.meaning: Maximum fraction any single vertex can hold. Diversity floor.
parameters.danger_sign: Setting to 1.0 = monopoly allowed. Setting below 1/6 = forced uniformity.

parameters.meaning: How many hops to follow when discovering. Higher = broader search.
parameters.danger_sign: Hardcoding to 0 = no exploration. Unbounded = potential infinite loop.

parameters.meaning: How fast trust drops when predictions fail.
parameters.danger_sign: Setting to 0 = no accountability. Setting to infinity = one mistake destroys all trust.

parameters.meaning: Bonus for acknowledging uncertainty. Reward for 'I don't know' when correct.
parameters.safe_range: Positive, less than base trust gain
parameters.danger_sign: Setting to 0 = no reward for honesty. Gaming: always abstain for free points.

parameters.meaning: Maximum ratio of enforcement to total organizational activity. Above this, containment becomes cage.
parameters.danger_sign: Above 0.50 = majority of activity is enforcement. Institution is a prison.

the_line.description: The boundary between tuning and violation.
the_line.principle: If changing a parameter makes an axiom unreachable — if no setting of the knobs can satisfy the law — then the change has crossed from tuning into destruction.
examples: Trust decay rate = 0 → AXIOM.IRREVERSIBILITY violated (no consequences)
Sensor registry emptied → AXIOM.AUTONOMY violated (self-awareness stripped)
All shapes forced to CUBE → AXIOM.SATURATION violated (monoculture)
the_line.enforcement: The self-audit module checks for these crossings. It can't prevent someone from forking — but it makes the violation visible. The physics doesn't hide.
